objective: Package and synchronize the advisory pilot for portable public use
prefetch: Read the slice plan and listed source files before broader search
constraints: No Go toolchain required for ordinary users
Review drift before overwriting global or ATV copies
acceptance_criteria: Installer handles binary install upgrade uninstall and fallback
Three operating systems build and smoke test
model_tier_reason: Supply-chain, installer, cross-platform, and multi-repo sync work is broad and high risk
escalation_triggers: Existing global or ATV copy has newer useful drift
Sync scope overlaps unrelated user changes
